summary: Smart Budget Optimizer V2 Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/optimization/presets returns 3 presets (beginner, balanced, aggressive)
Backend: GET /api/optimization/presets requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/optimization/set-preset changes user's preset to aggressive
Backend: POST /api/optimization/set-preset changes user's preset to beginner
Backend: POST /api/optimization/set-preset returns 400 for invalid preset
Backend: POST /api/optimization/toggle-auto-recommend enables auto-recommend mode
Backend: POST /api/optimization/toggle-auto-recommend disables auto-recommend mode
Backend: GET /api/optimization/settings returns preset and auto_recommend_enabled fields
Backend: GET /api/optimization/alerts returns alerts list with unread count
Backend: POST /api/optimization/alerts/mark-read marks all optimizer alerts as read
Backend: GET /api/optimization/dashboard-summary returns expected structure
Backend: GET /api/optimization/timeline/{test_id} returns timeline events
Backend: Preset change persists across requests
Backend: send_weekly_radar_digest task registered in job scheduler
Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status
Frontend: Landing page loads with hero section 'Find winning products early. Launch them faster.'
Frontend: Login flow works - admin user successfully authenticated
Frontend: Dashboard loads for Elite admin user
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'ELITE FEATURES' section
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Budget Optimizer' link under Elite Features
Frontend: /optimization page loads with Smart Budget Optimizer header
Frontend: Strategy Preset card with 'Change' button visible
Frontend: Clicking 'Change' shows 3 preset options (Beginner/Balanced/Aggressive)
Frontend: Auto-Recommend toggle card visible and interactive
Frontend: Auto-recommend enabled state shows green indicator 'Auto-recommend active — monitoring your ad tests'
Frontend: Optimizer Alerts section visible with 'No optimizer alerts yet' message
Frontend: 'View Ad Tests' button visible when no testId (for timeline selection)
Frontend: Preset selection flow works (clicked aggressive, toast confirmation shown)
Frontend: TrendScout Radar section on dashboard with products

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Smart Budget Optimizer V2 UI features verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Budget Optimizer V2 complete: (1) 3 Rule Presets (beginner/balanced/aggressive) - endpoints and UI selector working, (2) Auto-recommend toggle - enables/disables mode with green 'active' indicator when enabled, (3) Optimizer alerts - API returns alerts list with unread count, mark-read endpoint clears unread, (4) Timeline - GET /timeline/{test_id} returns events for specific ad test, (5) Dashboard summary - uses user's preset for recommendations, (6) Weekly radar digest - task registered at '0 8 * * 1' (Monday 8AM UTC). The Optimization Dashboard Widget on dashboard is conditionally rendered - only shows when user has active ad tests. No ad tests currently active so widget not visible.

Smart Budget Optimizer V2.presets_api: GET /api/optimization/presets returns beginner, balanced, aggressive with name and description
Smart Budget Optimizer V2.set_preset_api: POST /api/optimization/set-preset persists user's preset choice to profile
Smart Budget Optimizer V2.settings_api: GET /api/optimization/settings returns current preset and auto_recommend_enabled
Smart Budget Optimizer V2.alerts_api: GET /api/optimization/alerts returns alerts with unread count
Smart Budget Optimizer V2.frontend_preset_selector: Dropdown shows 3 options when 'Change' clicked, selection saves via API
Smart Budget Optimizer V2.frontend_auto_recommend_toggle: Switch toggles state, green indicator shows when enabled
Smart Budget Optimizer V2.frontend_alerts_section: Shows alerts list or 'No optimizer alerts yet' message
Smart Budget Optimizer V2.frontend_sidebar_nav: Budget Optimizer link under ELITE FEATURES section
